description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named osw-os_pr_check that runs on every pull request to the master and develop branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository and submodules, caches pip and PlatformIO, installs swig and PlatformIO, sets up Python, renames a configuration file, and runs PlatformIO for three different environments: pico32_LIGHT_EDITION, pico32_LIGHT_EDITION_LUA, and pico32_GPS_EDITION.
